configuration.walkthrough_role: audit equality only; never model input

objective_plan_audit.compiler: word-boundary compass directions in text order plus take coin

persistent_room_tree_repair.rule: if first delta has no room text, preserve physical current room; a following look is room_same, not room_previous

experiment: E3-SG20 strict return blocks and exact block solve

research_hypothesis.epistemic_status: mechanism repair on observed fifth games
research_hypothesis.statement: Orthogonal categorical return-state spikes eliminate cross-state negative transfer and expose exact independent ridge blocks.
research_hypothesis.what_if: What if one causal state partition fixes both rollout quality and cubic training structure?
